description: Cerebras provides cloud AI inference services and dedicated model endpoints on its wafer-scale compute platform. Its cloud console lets users create API keys, manage projects, and deploy or monitor inference workloads.
summary: Cerebras exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP inference API at `https://api.cerebras.ai/v1`, a public unauthenticated models endpoint, and an npm-distributed `cerebras-mcp` CLI for its Code MCP integration; dedicated endpoint management uses a separate Management API key.
